name: Omar Jarbou
title: Software Engineer
tagline: I build products that merge software intelligence with real-world hardware.
subtitle: Full-Stack Developer · AI/ML Enthusiast · Hardware Engineer
about: I'm a software engineer passionate about building complete systems — from the silicon to the screen. I specialize in connecting hardware and software through IoT platforms, AI-powered tools, and high-performance web applications. I believe the best engineering happens at the intersection of disciplines, and I bring that perspective to every project I work on.

highlights.title: Full-Stack Development
highlights.description: From RESTful APIs to pixel-perfect UIs, I ship complete, production-ready products.

highlights.title: Hardware Integration
highlights.description: Embedded systems, IoT devices, and robotics — I bridge the physical and digital worlds.

highlights.title: AI & Machine Learning
highlights.description: Computer vision, NLP, and LLM integrations that solve real, tangible problems.
